events.title: Annual Sports Day
events.description: Join us for our annual sports day featuring various sporting competitions, teams from different streams, and exciting entertainment.

events.title: Form 4 Graduation Ceremony
events.description: Celebrating the graduation of our Form 4 cohort with awards, speeches, and festive atmosphere.

events.title: Open Day for Prospective Students
events.description: Visit our school to explore our facilities, meet our staff, and learn about our programs. Perfect opportunity for prospective students and parents.

events.title: School Talent Show
events.description: Showcase of student talents including music, dance, drama, and other performances.

events.title: Science and Innovation Fair
events.description: Students display their scientific projects and innovations. Parents and visitors welcome.
